final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single-panel educational knowledge card for children about the 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs) from the 三国 era.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large knowledge-card layout with a clear title at top, key bullet points listed and numbered along the side, and a cartoon story scene as the main visual body
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story — key figures (曹操, 刘备, 孙权, 周瑜, 诸葛亮), the fire attack on the fleet, and the river battle setting
Scene/backdrop: must include the 长江 river with warships and fire, evoking the 赤壁 battle scene
Lighting/mood: needs a vivid, lively and child-friendly atmosphere — exact mood treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, engaging direction suitable for children — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a cartoon / illustrated card surface treatment — exact texture and finish are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" (title, prominent); bullet-point labels for key story beats alongside the illustration
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; bullet points must be visibly listed and marked with numbering or symbols beside the main illustration; content must be age-appropriate and easy to read for children
Avoid:
